project.name: VPN Tunnel Provisioning
project.description: IPsec VPN hub-and-spoke provisioning on Cisco ASA with NetBox IPAM and ServiceNow integration

a7b8.name: getIpamPrefixes
a7b8.summary: Count existing tunnel prefixes for seq_num

a7b8.name: postIpamIpAddresses
a7b8.summary: Create hub tunnel IP in NetBox

c9d0.name: postIpamIpAddresses
c9d0.summary: Create spoke tunnel IP in NetBox

spokes.title: spokes
spokes.description: Array of spoke definition objects, each matching Single-Spoke Orchestrator inputs

document.name: CT-ASA-Get-WAN-IP
document.description: Get WAN interface IP from ASA

document.name: CT-ASA-Verify-Trustpoint
document.description: Verify certificate trustpoint exists on ASA

document.name: CT-ASA-Hub-IPsec-Config
document.description: Apply IPsec crypto map entry and BGP neighbor on hub ASA

commands.command: crypto map <!crypto_map_name!> <!seq_num!> set ikev2 ipsec-proposal HIGH

document.name: CT-ASA-Spoke-IPsec-Config
document.description: Apply full IPsec tunnel and BGP config on spoke ASA

commands.command: crypto map VPN-MAP 10 match address VPN-ACL-HUB
crypto map VPN-MAP 10 set ikev2 ipsec-proposal HIGH
crypto map VPN-MAP 10 set pfs group14

document.name: CT-ASA-Verify-IKEv2-SA
document.description: Verify IKEv2 SA is established on ASA

document.name: CT-ASA-Verify-BGP
document.description: Verify BGP neighbor adjacency on ASA

commands.command: show bgp neighbors <!neighbor_ip!> | include BGP state

document.name: CT-ASA-Ping-Tunnel
document.description: Ping across tunnel interface on ASA

document.name: CT-ASA-Hub-Rollback
document.description: Remove tunnel crypto map entry and BGP neighbor from hub ASA

document.name: CT-ASA-Spoke-Rollback
document.description: Remove full tunnel config from spoke ASA
